name: Smothered Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 pound new potatoes, quartered and roasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large sauté pan, heat the oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onions to the hot oil. Season with salt and pepper. Sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add the walnuts and continue to sauté for another minute.
4. Add the roasted potatoes. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Continue to sauté for 2 more minutes. Add the garlic. Sauté for an additional minute.
6. Add the veal reduction and gently simmer the mixture until it comes to a simmer, about 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat and serve hot.
(Note: This Labor Day weekend throw some beef on the grill, but spice it up a bit. Chef Emeril Lagasse cooks a gourmet steak and smothered potato dish that will help you say goodbye to summer in style.)
